Credentials

Professional references and working values

The people who supervised and worked with me shaped the principles I carry into every role.

Home / Journal / Credentials / Professional References and Working Values
Credentials Published February 27, 2026 By Thomas Hayford

Career growth is never only about titles. It is also about the trust people place in your consistency, honesty, and delivery style. That is why I keep my professional references visible and updated.

In my CV, I list two references from my Hubtel environment: Mr. Julius Prah (Zonal Manager, immediate supervisor) and Mr. Michael Ampofo (Retailer Readiness Executive, associate). Their perspective reflects how I work in real operations.

The core values behind these references are simple: show up consistently, communicate early, support partners with respect, and close loops quickly. These values have helped me across relationship management, operations support, and founder work.

For me, references are not a final section on a CV. They are a mirror that keeps my standards high, especially when pressure is high.

Reference Notes

  • Immediate SupervisorMr. Julius Prah, Zonal Manager (Hubtel).
  • AssociateMr. Michael Ampofo, Retailer Readiness Executive (Hubtel).
  • Practical ValuesConsistency, communication, accountability, follow-through.
